name: Namely HR Platform API
what_it_does: Namely REST API for mid-market HR, payroll, benefits, and talent management. Enables AI agents to manage employee profile and HR records for mid-market workforce management, handle payroll processing and tax compliance for automated payroll operations, access benefits administration and open enrollment for HR benefits workflow, retrieve performance review and goal management for talent lifecycle automation, manage onboarding workflow and document collection for new hire automation, handle time and attendance tracking for workforce management compliance, access compensation management and salary benchmarking for HR analytics, retrieve compliance training and certification management, manage org chart and reporting structure for organizational design, and integrate Namely HR data with ATS, payroll, and benefits carrier platforms.
use_cases: Automating mid-market employee onboarding from HR agents
Managing performance reviews from talent management agents
Processing payroll from mid-market payroll agents
Administering open enrollment from benefits agents
not_for: Enterprise HR requiring advanced global HRIS
Small businesses needing simple SMB payroll only
Organizations requiring complex union or CBA workforce rules
best_when: A mid-market US employer (50-1,000 employees) using Namely wants AI agents to automate HR records, payroll, benefits, performance management, and employee lifecycle operations.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL STABILITY RISK: Namely faced significant financial difficulties (2020 equity crowdfunding, founder departure, executive changes); verify current platform stability and API roadmap before long-term integration investment. Namely payroll requires accurate multi-state tax jurisdiction mapping; automated multi-state payroll errors create state tax compliance liability. Performance management AI must not create disparate impact in promotion or compensation decisions; automated performance scoring requires HR governance review.

auth.notes: Namely uses OAuth 2.0. API documentation at namely.readme.io. Webhooks for HR events. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Founded 2012 by Matt Straz. Mid-market HR platform. Faced financial difficulties 2020 (equity crowdfunding via Wefunder). PE-backed (Altimeter Capital, True Ventures). Competes with BambooHR, Rippling, and Zenefits for mid-market HR platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-employee monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee monthly subscription; HR, payroll, and benefits modules
pricing.notes: New York, NY. Founded 2012. Mid-market HR platform. Financial difficulties 2020. Altimeter/True Ventures-backed. Competes with BambooHR and Rippling for mid-market HR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL STABILITY RISK: Namely faced significant financial difficulties in 2020 (equity crowdfunding, founder departure); verify current platform stability and API investment trajectory before long-term integration
Multi-state payroll jurisdiction — Namely payroll requires accurate state and local tax jurisdiction assignment; automated multi-state payroll errors create state tax audit and penalty risk
Performance AI discrimination — automated performance scoring or promotion recommendations must be reviewed for disparate impact; EEOC Title VII applies to algorithmic HR decisions
HIPAA benefits data — benefits enrollment data contains employee health information; BAA required for all integrations accessing PHI
Webhook reliability — verify current webhook reliability and retry behavior post-2020 financial restructuring; webhook infrastructure may have been impacted
API versioning — Namely API versioning strategy during financial uncertainty may have resulted in breaking changes; pin to documented stable version
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mid-market HR platform. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee HR, payroll, and benefits data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mid-market HR. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee HR and payroll data.
